summary: Iteration 9 testing complete: All new Payment, Onboarding & Follow-up features working correctly. Backend 22/22 tests passed. Frontend pages verified: PaymentsPage, OnboardingPage, CoursesPage S5 column.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment schedules support both recurrence types: monthly_day (fixed day of month) and interval_days (every X days like 28)
Onboarding has 5 steps: bsport, hubfit, nutrition, questionnaire_coaching, session_introduction
Completing all 5 onboarding steps automatically sets onboarding_completed=true with date
Follow-ups have 4 types: monthly, onboarding, renewal, payment
Alerts summary endpoint aggregates: late_payments, missed_followups, expiring_subscriptions, incomplete_onboarding, upcoming_followups
Courses table now has S5 (week 5) column for months with 5 weeks
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary data with TEST_ prefix and cleanup after
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) PaymentsPage at /payments - payment tracking with tabs for all payments, late, upcoming, and schedules. Supports creating payment schedules with monthly_day or interval_days recurrence. Generate payments for a month. Mark payments as paid. (2) OnboardingPage at /onboarding - shows members with incomplete onboarding, 5-step checklist (bsport, hubfit, nutrition, coaching questionnaire, intro session), clickable steps to toggle completion, follow-up scheduling with 4 types. (3) CoursesPage S5 column - table now has S1-S5 attendance columns for weeks 1-5. (4) Alerts summary API returns counts of late payments, missed followups, expiring subscriptions, incomplete onboarding. Test credentials: test@crossfit.ch / test123.

features_tested.payments_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with 'Suivi des Paiements' title
features_tested.payments_tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: Paiements, En retard, À venir, Plannings
features_tested.payments_stats_cards: PASS - Total, En retard, En attente, Payés, Montant en retard
features_tested.payments_add_schedule_button: PASS - 'Nouveau planning' button visible and opens modal
features_tested.payments_schedule_modal: PASS - Modal has member, amount, recurrence type, day, start date fields
features_tested.payment_schedules_api_post_monthly_day: PASS - POST creates schedule with monthly_day recurrence
features_tested.payment_schedules_api_post_interval_days: PASS - POST creates schedule with interval_days (28 days)
features_tested.payments_api_mark_paid: PASS - POST /api/payments/{id}/mark-paid updates status to paid
features_tested.payments_api_late: PASS - GET /api/payments/late returns late payments and updates status
features_tested.payments_api_generate: PASS - POST /api/payments/generate/{year}/{month} generates payments from schedules
features_tested.onboarding_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with 'Onboarding & Suivi' title
features_tested.onboarding_tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: Onboarding, À venir, Manqués, Historique
features_tested.onboarding_stats_cards: PASS - Onboarding en cours, Suivis à venir, Suivis manqués, Complétés ce mois
features_tested.onboarding_member_cards: PASS - Member cards with 5 onboarding steps displayed
features_tested.onboarding_add_followup_button: PASS - 'Planifier un suivi' button opens modal
features_tested.onboarding_followup_modal: PASS - Modal has member, date, type, notes fields
features_tested.onboarding_pending_api: PASS - GET /api/onboarding/pending returns members with onboarding progress
features_tested.onboarding_complete_all_steps: PASS - Completing all 5 steps sets onboarding_completed=true
